mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comtrade_record (user_id, file_name, station_name, device_id, start_time, trigger_time, analog_count, digital_count, line_frequency, cfg_file_path, dat_file_path, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{fileName}, #{stationName}, #{deviceId}, #{startTime}, #{triggerTime}, #{analogCount}, #{digitalCount}, #{lineFrequency}, #{cfgFilePath}, #{datFilePath}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, file_name, station_name, device_id, start_time, trigger_time, analog_count, digital_count, line_frequency, cfg_file_path, dat_file_path, create_time FROM comtrade_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id, file_name, station_name, device_id, start_time, trigger_time, analog_count, digital_count, line_frequency, cfg_file_path, dat_file_path, create_time FROM comtrade_record WHERE id = #{id}
